mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(VSTO_CNT), 0) + 1 AS vstoCnt FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VSTO_CCTN_L WHERE CCTN_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')
MERGE INTO TB_BOX_IVT_VSTO_CCTN_L tbivcl USING DUAL ON (tbivcl.CCTN_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET VSTO_CNT = #{vstoCnt} , AMNN_USER_ID = #{amnnUserId} , AMNN_TS = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( CCTN_DT , VSTO_CNT , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS ) VALUES ( TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') , 1 , #{rgsnUserId} , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP , #{amnnUserId} , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
